name: kbot-saas
description: K-Bot SaaS - Sistema Multi-Tenant para Bots de WhatsApp e Telegram com IA

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd src/backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../engine && npm install
scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend & npm run dev:engine
scripts.migrate: cd src/backend && npx prisma migrate deploy

author: K-Bot
